name_en: Former Annaka Domain Samurai Row House
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former samurai row house (nagaya) of the Annaka Domain. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1992-03-25, located at Annaka 3-chōme 6-1.

name_en: Former Annaka Domain District Magistrate's Residence
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former official residence of the district magistrate (kōribugyō) of the Annaka Domain. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1992-04-28, located at Annaka 3-chōme 6-9.

name_romaji: Gōbara-mura no Kenchi-zao to Mizuchō, Menjō
name_en: Land-Survey Measuring Pole, Land Register, and Tax Assessment of Gōbara Village
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the land-survey measuring pole, land register (mizuchō), and tax assessment (menjō) of Gōbara Village. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1994-01-28, located at Gōbara 770-1.

name_en: Beni Jizō of Hattōishi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Beni Jizō stone image at Hattōishi. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1994-09-09, located at Matsuida-machi Yashiro 168.

name_en: Former Usui District Government Office
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the former district government office of Usui. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1996-02-21, located at Annaka 3-chōme 21-51.

name_en: Paleolithic Stone Tools Excavated from the Kojō Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising Paleolithic stone tools excavated from the Kojō site. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2001-05-22, located at Kaminita 951.

name_en: Pine-and-Crane Mirror Excavated from the Saginomiya-Kaminokubo Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a pine-and-crane bronze mirror excavated from the Saginomiya-Kaminokubo site. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2001-05-22, located at Kaminita 951.

name_romaji: Shimo-Akima Fujinoki no Jizō Bosatsu Sekizō
name_en: Stone Statue of the Bodhisattva Jizō at Shimo-Akima Fujinoki
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone statue of the bodhisattva Jizō at Fujinoki in Shimo-Akima. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2001-05-22, located at Shimo-Akima 2234.

name_en: Globe Made by Ōyama Yūsai
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a terrestrial globe made by Ōyama Yūsai. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2009-10-23, located at Kaminita 951 / Haraichi 1-chōme.

name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Yanase Futagozuka Kofun
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising artifacts excavated from the Yanase Futagozuka burial mound. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2012-11-27, located at Kaminita 951.

name_en: Wooden-Panel Lotus Mandala of Renkyūji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the wooden-panel Lotus mandala of Renkyūji Temple. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2014-07-28, located at Annaka 3-chōme 3-55.

name_en: Documents of the Satō Kajō Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising documents of the Satō Kajō family. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2014-07-28, located at Kaminita 951.

name_romaji: Matsuida Nakamachi no Shishigashira (Tsuketari Byōbu, Tōban Hikitsumi Shorui, Saiten Nyūyōchō Nisatsu, Saiten Kirokuchō)
name_en: Lion Head of Matsuida Nakamachi (with Folding Screen, Duty Records, Two Festival Expense Ledgers, and Festival Record Book)
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the lion head (shishigashira) of Matsuida Nakamachi, together with a folding screen, duty-transfer documents, two festival expense ledgers, and a festival record book. It is a municipally designated important cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2015-10-27, located at Matsuida-machi Matsuida 400-2.

name_romaji: Sakisaki Jinja Daidai Kagura, Saginomiya Daidai Kagura Hozonkai
name_en: Daidai Kagura of Sakisaki Shrine and the Saginomiya Daidai Kagura Preservation Society
description_en: An intangible cultural property, the Daidai Kagura sacred dance of Sakisaki Shrine maintained by the Saginomiya Daidai Kagura Preservation Society. It is a municipally designated important intangible cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1979-03-26, located at Saginomiya 3308.

name_romaji: Yashiro no Ningyō Jōruri (Tsuketari Kashira Gojukko)
name_en: Puppet Theater of Yashiro (with Fifty Puppet Heads)
description_en: An intangible cultural property, the ningyō jōruri puppet theater of Yashiro, together with fifty puppet heads. It is a municipally designated important intangible cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 1998-09-26, located at Matsuida-machi Yashiro 170-1.

name_en: Jishōji Ware Potter Aoki Noboru
description_en: An intangible cultural property, the Jishōji ware ceramic art of the potter Aoki Noboru. It is a municipally designated important intangible cultural property of Annaka City, designated on 2018-09-26, located at Shimo-Akima 4670-1.

name_romaji: Sengoku Inaba-no-kami no Sekishi Oyobi Shōtokuhi
name_en: Stone Shrine and Merit Monument of Sengoku Inaba-no-kami
description_en: A monument (historic site), the stone shrine and memorial merit monument of Sengoku Inaba-no-kami. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1957-04-10, located at Isobe 76-2.

name_en: Head Mound of Yanase Hachimandaira
description_en: A monument (historic site), the head mound (kubizuka) of Yanase Hachimandaira. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1959-10-01, located at Yanase 769.

name_en: Nodono Tennōzuka Kofun
description_en: A monument (historic site), the Nodono Tennōzuka burial mound. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1963-09-27, located at Nodono 569.

name_romaji: Motosuke Iseki Gishi Sekizō, Motosuke Iseki Gishi Kuyōtō
name_en: Loyal-Retainer Stone Statue and Memorial Monument of the Motosuke Site
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising a loyal-retainer stone statue and memorial monument at the Motosuke site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1964-09-12, located at Higashi-Kamiakima 3197-1 and Higashi-Kamiakima 2041-1.

name_en: Former Residence of Niijima Jō
description_en: A monument (historic site), the former residence of Niijima Jō. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1964-12-30, located at Annaka 1-chōme 7-30.

name_en: Grave of Araki Torasaburō
description_en: A monument (historic site), the grave of Araki Torasaburō. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1966-02-12, located at Itahana 387.

name_en: Gokan Castle Ruins
description_en: A monument (historic site), the ruins of Gokan Castle. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1969-06-30, located at Naka-Gokan 394.

name_en: Grave of Ōyama Yūsai
description_en: A monument (historic site), the grave of Ōyama Yūsai. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1970-05-28, located at Annaka 3-chōme 21-25.

name_en: Grave of Yamada Sansen
description_en: A monument (historic site), the grave of Yamada Sansen. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1970-05-28, located at Annaka 2-chōme 7-19.

name_en: Shitsuen no Ki Monument
description_en: A monument (historic site), a commemorative stone monument known as the Shitsuen no Ki. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1970-10-01, located at Annaka 1-chōme 7-30.

name_romaji: Ishikawa Tadafusa Seishi no Hi Oyobi Seishi
name_en: Living-Shrine Monument and Living Shrine of Ishikawa Tadafusa
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising the living-shrine (seishi) monument and living shrine of Ishikawa Tadafusa. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1970-10-01, located at Annaka 3-chōme 20-16.

name_romaji: Ii Naomasa Seishitsu no Haka, Naoyoshi Seibo no Haka
name_en: Graves of Ii Naomasa's Wife and Naoyoshi's Mother
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising the graves of the wife of Ii Naomasa and the birth mother of Naoyoshi. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1971-10-01, located at Annaka 3-chōme 21-44.

name_en: Nita Site
description_en: A monument (historic site), the Nita archaeological site. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1972-11-28, located at Matsuida-machi Iriyama, Nita.

name_en: Raised Formal Room of the Horigome Family
description_en: A monument (historic site), the raised formal room (jōdan no ma) of the Horigome family residence. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1972-11-28, located at Matsuida-machi Hitomi 1705-1.

name_en: Grave of Iwai Shigetō
description_en: A monument (historic site), the grave of Iwai Shigetō. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1973-07-13, located at Matsuida-machi Arai, Shiozawa.

name_en: Ruins of the Annaka Enclosure of Matsuida Castle
description_en: A monument (historic site), the ruins of the Annaka enclosure (kuruwa) of Matsuida Castle. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1974-06-27, located at Matsuida-machi Nibori 1287.

name_en: Kannenbutsu Bridge Memorial Monument
description_en: A monument (historic site), the Kannenbutsu bridge memorial monument. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1977-12-22, located at Itahana 186.

name_en: Site of the Benransha
description_en: A monument (historic site), the site of the Benransha. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1978-12-21, located at Annaka 2-chōme 10-15.

name_en: Hundred Batō Kannon Images of Tate
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising a hundred Batō Kannon (Horse-Headed Kannon) images at Tate. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1986-02-26, located at Shimo-Akima 1400-2.

name_en: Grave of Kashiwagi Gien
description_en: A monument (historic site), the grave of Kashiwagi Gien. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 1989-07-20, located at Annaka 3-chōme 21-25.

name_en: Manpukubara Kofun (Akima Tomb No. 12)
description_en: A monument (historic site), the Manpukubara burial mound, also known as Akima Tomb No. 12. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 2000-09-27, located at Shimo-Akima 2097-2.

name_en: Hundred Kōshin Monuments of Shimo-Akima Ushirodaira
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising a hundred Kōshin stone monuments at Ushirodaira in Shimo-Akima. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 2003-03-26, located at Shimo-Akima 1837-1.

name_en: Main Bailey, Second Bailey, and Barbican of Matsuida Castle
description_en: A monument (historic site) comprising the main bailey (honmaru), second bailey (ninomaru), and barbican (umadashi) of Matsuida Castle. It is a municipally designated historic site of Annaka City, designated on 2023-03-27, located at Matsuida-machi Takanashi, Shiroyama (main bailey 1545 kō/otsu/hei, second bailey 1543, barbican 1544).

name_en: Great Zelkova Tree
description_en: A monument (natural monument), a great zelkova (keyaki) tree. It is a municipally designated natural monument of Annaka City, designated on 1962-03-27, located at Annaka 3-chōme 689.
